title: Random Ore
body:
# Random Ore
This mod is simple, if you mine the new ore you can get every vanilla ore in your version
### it looks like this:
![Random Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc9aeac9479b4d6949b340eed359169112319cb8.png)
### In future updates:
- more balanced odds
- support for other versions
